name: Keurig Dr Pepper
analysis: KDP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $30.8900, stop $29.6208, target $34.6976 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
